reason: Publish BatikCraft Studio 0.8.1: foundation for the raster-per-layer canvas rework (stage 2). Adds the RasterLayer bitmap model where drawing writes pixels directly, canvas resize preserves existing pixels (add or crop blank space, never blur), full-document flatten for the library, and configurable canvas size presets (Screen, A4, A3, fabric) plus free size. Not yet wired into the canvas UI; groundwork only, fully unit-tested.
